description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-dialog` (T1-27). 6/6 libraries — highest-risk a11y component.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dialog/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, modal/non-modal variants, return value typing, close reason typing
2. Accessibility — uses native `<dialog>` element (mandatory for correct a11y), `aria-labelledby` pointing to title, `aria-describedby` pointing to content, focus trap inside when open, Escape closes, focus returns to trigger on close, backdrop click closes (optional but correct), scroll locked when open, axe-core pass
3. Tests — open/close, Escape closes, backdrop click, focus trap (Tab/Shift+Tab cycle within), focus restoration, form inside dialog, alert dialog variant (`role="alertdialog"`)
4. Storybook — modal/non-modal, alert dialog, form dialog, with/without close button
5. CSS — backdrop styling, `--hx-*` tokens, animation respects `prefers-reduced-motion`, CSS parts (dialog, header, body, footer, close-button)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable trigger, content via slots

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dialog/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-dialog — T1-27 antagonistic quality review
